canonical_definition: Producing a narrative account of a past event conditioned on a specific persona, reflecting either direct or indirect experiential involvement.

definitions.text: Producing a narrative account of a past event conditioned on a specific persona, reflecting either direct or indirect experiential involvement.
Generating narrative accounts of real historical events based on brief prompts, often from a specified perspective or role.

characterization: Producing a narrative account of a past event conditioned on a specific persona, reflecting either direct or indirect experiential involvement.
